title: penstemon parryi
intro: Penstemon parryi, also known as Parry's penstemon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant has been used to relieve symptoms of colds, coughs, and respiratory problems, as well as to treat wounds, and skin irritations. Penstemon parryi can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
